displayTitle: Darth Vader: Dark Lord of the Sith - No Good Deed
synopsis:
On Darth Vader's Venator-class Star Destroyer, Lord Vader directed a mouse droid to ready his meditation chamber. Admiral Mummert's report of ships unable to meet the Hortolo system deadline led to Vader's frustration, culminating in a fatal force choke. Following this, a report from an Imperial general indicated the readiness of only 10,000 troops out of the 50,000 ordered to be deployed to the Winnikk System, resulting in the same fate for the general. Meanwhile, Vader's TIE fighter proved irreparable, and the officer reporting the situation was met with Vader's exasperation and another Force-imposed silence.
Despite the setbacks, the mouse droid diligently resumed preparing the meditation chamber. Vader's brief contemplative moment was disrupted when the droid unexpectedly crashed into him, prompting him to swiftly end its existence with his lightsaber. He remarked to himself, "At last," seeking a moment of quiet amidst the turbulent affairs of his flagship.
title: Darth Vader: Dark Lord of the Sith - No Good Deed
